stdout:
[36m[Claude][0m Hold for Claude...


[36m[Claude][0m Hi! I'm Claude, an AI assistant in this meeting. I can look things up and answer questions in real time, or help track action items and next steps as we go.


[36m[Claude][0m Let me check the live captions for that.


[36m[Claude][0m Let me pull more captions to find where you said your name.


[36m[Claude][0m The captions show several speakers — Alice, Bob, Carol, Dan, Eve — but I didn't catch anyone explicitly stating their name. Could you tell me which one is you, or say your name again?


[36m[Claude][0m Three threads in the last 5 minutes: Alice flagged slow startup and wants to double-check a size limit on tool output. Alice and Priya have a concern about the approval policy, with a lean toward a 10% rollout first. Bob wants to confirm the marker file holds up through a crash.


[36m[Claude][0m Alice flagged Sentry alerts firing on the auth path around 17:37 and shared a dashboard link. Carol echoed it. Eve said she'd check Sentry again at 17:47 — no follow-up captured after that.


[36m[Claude][0m Five speakers: Alice and Bob have been the most active, Carol has chipped in a few times, and Dan and Eve each said one thing.


[36m[Claude][0m Two overlapping threads: Alice explained why the marker file approach beats an env var for a startup-ordering problem in codex. Separately, good news on prompt cache hit rates, but Bob wanted to pull up a GitHub issue for a related bug, and Alice noted the migration timeline is slipping.


[36m[Claude][0m Yes — Alice raised the launch timeline early on, and Dan said the launch is the priority this week. No follow-up captured on either.


[36m[Claude][0m Based on everything captured so far:


[36m[Claude][0m **Infra / reliability:** The marker file approach won out over env vars for a startup-ordering problem in codex. Bob wants to confirm it survives a crash. There's unexplained latency on the MCP startup path, and captions dropped for a stretch mid-meeting.


[36m[Claude][0m **Rollout / policy:** Priya has concerns about the approval policy. The lean is toward a 10% rollout first. The migration timeline is slipping.


[36m[Claude][0m **Incidents:** Sentry alerts have been firing on the auth path — Alice shared a dashboard link, Eve said she'd check it again, no resolution captured. A leaked token still needs to be revoked.


[36m[Claude][0m **Good news:** Prompt cache hit rates looked strong. The wizard re-import flow is now idempotent. New Sonnet benchmarks looked good on coding tasks.


[36m[Claude][0m **Priority:** Dan said the launch is the top priority this week. Alice flagged it at the start too, but there was no detailed discussion captured on timeline.


[36m[Claude][0m Three hits. Bob said it first, Alice echoed it twice:


[36m[Claude][0m > "Postgres for prod SQLite for tests is the standard split." — Bob, 17:38
> "Mohammed pinged me about the database pick." — Alice, 17:40

queries: what name did I just say
what did anyone say about Sentry
what was the topic 8 to 10 minutes ago
quote the part where someone talked about the database
